zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Musgrave於1227年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德格亞特 馬斯格雷夫時，他的父親Richard de Musgrave29歲，母親Isabella25歲。他於1255年與Sybil de Mennon在英國維斯特莫藍德格亞特 馬斯格雷夫結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1287年在他的家鄉享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Musgrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Musgrove
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Musgrave in Cumbria. The placename derives from Old English mūs ‘mouse’ + grāf ‘copse, grove’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Musgrave was born in 1227, in Great Musgrave, Westmorland, England, his father, Richard de Musgrave, was 29 and his mother, Isabella, was 25. He married Sybil de Mennon in 1255, in Great Musgrave, Westmorland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1287, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

Il a épousé Sybil de Mennon en 1255, à Great Musgrave, Westmorland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1287, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Musgraveが1227年にイギリスウエストモーランドグレアト ムスグラブで生まれた時，父Richard de Musgraveは29歳，母Isabellaは25歳であった。1255年にイギリスウエストモーランドグレアト ムスグラブでSybil de Mennonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1287年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Musgrave(이)가 1227년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 그리트 무스그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Musgrave(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1255년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 그리트 무스그레이브에서 Sybil de Mennon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1287년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Musgrave родился в 1227 г. в местности грит мусграв, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Musgrave было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybil de Mennon в 1255 г. в местности грит мусграв, вестморланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1287 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.
